days.summary: Introduced a broad multi-tab and workflow-oriented frontend update, wiring tab persistence, session workflow APIs, launch workflow hooks, project dropdown behavior, real-time operation center views, toolkit panels, and related routing/configuration changes.
frontendChangeBullets: Introduced multi-tab workspace navigation so users can keep multiple sessions and pages open together.
Added persisted tab and session state so workspace context can be restored after app restarts.
Added workflow launch support so users can start and track workflow-driven sessions more easily.
Improved project dropdown behavior across workspace launch flows.
Expanded real-time operation center views and toolkit panels for richer in-workspace context.
backendChangeBullets: Wired session workflow APIs that support launching and tracking workflow-driven sessions.
Added launch workflow hooks that connect UI actions to workflow execution paths.
Improved routing and configuration behind multi-tab workspace behavior.
Added persistence support for tab and session state used by the workspace shell.
Connected realtime operation center data paths to the panels that display live activity.

days.summary: Delivered a UI-focused sweep across Codebase and Database pages, branch/session selectors, tab management, embedded IDE demos, workspace center layouts, and project/history surfaces.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined Codebase page layouts for a cleaner and more focused workspace experience.
Refined Database page layouts so data-oriented views feel more organized.
Improved branch and session selectors to make switching context easier.
Added embedded IDE demos to preview deeper coding experiences inside ORGII.
Polished project, history, and workspace center surfaces for better navigation.
backendChangeBullets: Updated routing and configuration used by Codebase, Database, and workspace center pages.
Improved selector data plumbing for branch and session context changes.
Added support paths for embedded IDE demo surfaces.
Improved tab management state used by project and history navigation.
Refined workspace center data flow so page context and navigation state stay aligned.

days.summary: Added and reworked session/replay infrastructure, including event wrappers, mock event tooling, realtime and workflow center components, replay hooks, workspace synchronization hooks, console/window utilities, and supporting documentation/assets.
frontendChangeBullets: Added session replay foundations so users can review past agent and workflow activity.
Improved realtime event rendering for clearer progress and action visibility.
Expanded workflow center components to make session state easier to inspect.
Added replay hooks and views that keep live and replayed activity understandable.
Improved console and window utilities that support smoother replay and workspace review.
backendChangeBullets: Added event wrappers to normalize session and workflow activity for replay.
Added mock event tooling for testing replay and realtime event presentations.
Added replay hooks that connect stored session events to review surfaces.
Strengthened workspace synchronization hooks so replayed and live activity stay aligned.
Added supporting assets and documentation for session replay and workflow center infrastructure.

days.summary: Refined the workflow/replay experience with adaptive container sizing, updated mock explore events, improved action collapse rendering, realtime controls/status, workflow explore modals, and chat playback controls.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved replay layouts with adaptive container sizing for better fit across workspace views.
Updated mock explore events so replay demonstrations show richer activity patterns.
Polished action collapse rendering so long activity streams are easier to scan.
Enhanced realtime controls and status displays for clearer session playback.
Updated workflow explore modals and chat playback controls for smoother review.
backendChangeBullets: Improved sizing configuration behind workflow and replay containers.
Updated mock explore event data used by replay and workflow review views.
Refined action-step rendering data so collapsed actions stay readable.
Improved realtime status state used by playback controls.
Strengthened chat playback control hooks so replay navigation follows session event state.

days.summary: Removed legacy Electron integration while continuing to polish replay/action-collapse UI and loading states. The work touched Tauri-facing desktop headers, container height configuration, realtime/replay panels, and action-step rendering details.
frontendChangeBullets: Focused the desktop experience on Tauri by removing older desktop integration paths.
Improved replay and realtime panels with cleaner loading and visual states.
Polished action-step styling so replayed work is easier to read.
Adjusted desktop header behavior for a more consistent app layout.
Improved workspace sizing through better container height configuration.
backendChangeBullets: Removed older Electron integration paths to simplify the desktop runtime surface.
Refined Tauri-facing desktop header handling.
Updated container height configuration used by replay and workspace panels.
Improved loading state infrastructure for realtime and replay data.
Cleaned action-step rendering logic that powers replay panel details.

days.summary: Improved desktop-window and interaction ergonomics with global shortcuts, app menu/window handling, modal dismissal behavior, dropdown styling consistency, minimum window sizing, launchpad tab shortcuts, and a refreshed chat/workspace UI with adaptive sizing.
frontendChangeBullets: Added global desktop shortcuts for faster app, window, and tab actions.
Improved app menu and window handling for a smoother desktop experience.
Improved modal dismissal so dialogs close naturally with escape or outside clicks.
Refreshed chat and workspace UI with adaptive sizing for different window sizes.
Polished menus, dropdowns, launchpad tab shortcuts, and minimum window behavior.
backendChangeBullets: Added global shortcut wiring for desktop-level app and tab actions.
Improved app menu and window runtime handling.
Updated modal dismissal infrastructure so escape and outside-click behavior is consistent.
Added minimum window sizing constraints for safer desktop layout behavior.
Refined launchpad tab shortcut handling behind faster workspace navigation.

days.summary: Focused on navigation, tab, sidebar, and spotlight behavior: added spotlight entry points, editor and terminal pages, router/component debug shortcuts, recently-closed tab support, tab dragging fixes, and multiple menu/sidebar visual adjustments. Several merge commits integrated Tauri/Theia-related branches while replay status and realtime controls also received fixes.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded Spotlight and navigation entry points for faster access to app destinations.
Added editor and terminal pages to broaden the in-app development workspace.
Improved tab management with recently closed tab support.
Fixed tab dragging behavior so workspace organization feels smoother.
Polished sidebar, menu, replay status, and realtime controls for a cleaner workflow.
backendChangeBullets: Added router and component debug shortcuts to speed up development and diagnosis.
Integrated Tauri and Theia-related branch work into the navigation and editor flows.
Added recently closed tab state handling behind the tab manager.
Improved realtime control state used by replay status displays.
Expanded route configuration for editor, terminal, Spotlight, and navigation entry points.

days.summary: Advanced the editor/repo launchpad flow with branch APIs, repo/project/branch sidebars, new editor components, clone-flow improvements, external IDE opening support, and system configuration UI. The day also included extensive launchpad, avatar, border, dropdown, and command-shortcut refinements plus merge integration work.
frontendChangeBullets: Advanced the editor launchpad with project, repository, and branch selection flows.
Added branch-aware workspace support so users can choose the right code context more easily.
Added repository, project, and branch sidebars for clearer launchpad navigation.
Improved external IDE opening and clone flows for smoother handoff into coding tools.
Polished launchpad visuals, shortcuts, avatars, borders, dropdowns, and command interactions.
backendChangeBullets: Added branch APIs used by editor and repository launchpad flows.
Improved clone-flow runtime support for bringing repositories into the workspace.
Added external IDE opening support behind the launchpad handoff experience.
Added system configuration UI wiring to expose relevant runtime settings.
Integrated branch, repository, and project data paths used by the new sidebars.

days.summary: Expanded project/editor and session-history capabilities: added analytics instrumentation, improved filter autocomplete and session history UI, refined repo list location/customization and routing, strengthened branch/git tooling, and continued editor-page, sidebar, and milestone task UI polish.
frontendChangeBullets: Added analytics instrumentation to better understand workspace usage and improve the product.
Improved session history with filtering and autocomplete for faster review of past work.
Refined repository list location and customization within project and editor flows.
Polished routing, sidebars, and milestone task views for smoother navigation.
Strengthened branch and Git tooling across editor and project workflows.
backendChangeBullets: Added analytics event plumbing behind workspace usage instrumentation.
Improved filter autocomplete data handling for session history.
Strengthened branch and Git tooling used by project and editor pages.
Refined routing configuration for repository lists and session history surfaces.
Improved data flow behind milestone task UI and project workflow state.

days.summary: Shifted the embedded editor stack from Theia toward code-server while improving launch performance and scripts. Work also added an Inbox page, tightened launchpad/spotlight behavior, enhanced component issue search/navigation, and removed legacy Theia generated files and helpers.
frontendChangeBullets: Moved the embedded editor experience toward code-server for a more focused development environment.
Improved launch performance so local app sessions start faster.
Added an Inbox page to give users a dedicated place for incoming work or updates.
Tightened launchpad and Spotlight behavior for faster workspace navigation.
Enhanced issue search and navigation with highlighting and keyboard-friendly controls.
backendChangeBullets: Improved startup scripts used by local launch and embedded editor workflows.
Added code-server-oriented extension and runtime groundwork for embedded development.
Removed old Theia generated files and helpers to simplify the editor stack.
Improved component issue search data handling and navigation support.
Refined launch performance paths around workspace startup and editor initialization.

days.summary: Continued code-server extension and WebSocket bridge work, expanded GlobalSpotlight navigation/actions, removed the research feature and its routing/localization/API surfaces, and refactored Home routing plus shared Home initialization components. The day also included sitemap, header/navigation, and UI cleanup work.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved code-server extension management visibility for embedded workspace development.
Expanded GlobalSpotlight navigation and actions so users can find and manage workspace items faster.
Removed the research feature to simplify navigation and reduce unused product surfaces.
Refined Home routing and shared startup modals for a clearer first-run experience.
Improved sitemap, header navigation, and general UI cleanup across Home surfaces.
backendChangeBullets: Continued code-server extension work behind embedded workspace capabilities.
Improved WebSocket bridge reliability for workspace communication.
Removed research feature routing, localization, and API surfaces to reduce unused code paths.
Refactored Home initialization components into shared startup infrastructure.
Updated sitemap and route data used by Spotlight, Home, and navigation surfaces.
